rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proved by `rfl`) causes simp to eagerly unfold `includeRight` before the four characteristic API lemmas (`counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, `map_includeRight`) can fire, making them dead simp lemmas — a real, diff-confirmed API design flaw. Review 2 incorrectly declares all `@[simp]` placements sound and approves without finding this issue.
